# Eigen
set(EIGEN_BUILD_TESTS OFF)
add_subdirectory(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/eigen)

# GoogleTest
if (STURM_BUILD_TESTS)
  add_subdirectory(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/googletest)
endif()
